channel.title: iamdeathgod — Gaming, Anime & Productivity Blog
channel.description: Real talk on gaming, anime, and actually useful productivity tips for people who don't sleep. Templates, guides, and stuff that actually works.

item.title: How to Build a Notion Anime Watchlist That Actually Helps You Keep Up — iamdeathgod
item.description: Anime season is overwhelming. Here's how to build a Notion watchlist that stops you from forgetting what to watch and actually helps you enjoy more shows.

item.title: Best Anime to Watch in March 2026 — iamdeathgod
item.description: Frieren Season 2, JoJo Steel Ball Run, Jujutsu Kaisen and more. Here's what's actually worth watching this March — no filler, no hype, just the real ones.

item.title: Why Every Gamer Needs a Notion Dashboard — iamdeathgod
item.description: I used to have 47 browser tabs open tracking my game backlog. Here's how I fixed it with one Notion setup that I actually use every day.
